form.formComment: Racing well recently. At the latest run 2nd of 7 at this track in the LR Melvista on April 1 over 2200m, on a slow track; 1.3 len behind Sentimental Legend carrying 56kg at $2.60. Before that won by 0.6 len at this track LR J C Roberts March 14 over 1800m defeating Sentimental Legend with 54kg at $3.20. Gets a weight swing in his favour and it wouldn't surprise to see him turn the tables.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run led but faded 3rd of 7 at this track in the LR Melvista on April 1 over 2200m, slow going 2.5 len behind Sentimental Legend carrying 54kg at $7. form.formComment: Form hard to fault. At the latest run favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; scored a big 4 len win at this track G3 Wa Oaks April 1 over 2400m in soft going defeating Poppy's Roses carrying 55.5kg at $2.05. The run before that 3rd of 8 at this track in the LR Natasha on March 14 over 2200m, 1.5 len behind Masmelo with 56kg at $1.50. Was dominant in the Oaks and creates plenty of interest lining up against the boys here.
